economic_notes: Nation holds 49% of Wasaya Group Inc (holding company), 51% of Wasaya Partnership (aircraft operations and petroleum), and 16.66% of Happy Time Real Estate Holdings LP (AVID-FN Motel One LP in Thunder Bay, grand opening expected July 2024). Consolidated entities include First Nation Program, Equay Wuk Women's Shelter, Nu-Mah-Koos Non-Profit Building Development Corporation, and Pe-Tay-Ka-Win Development Corporation and subsidiaries.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 but audit report is dated February 5, 2024 — significant delay in audit completion. Consolidated entity includes Pe-Tay-Ka-Win Development Corporation and subsidiaries. GBEs (Wasaya Group, Wasaya Partnership, Happy Time Real Estate) accounted for by modified equity method using December 31, 2021 financial information. Large construction in progress of $45.7M primarily for school project ($42.8M). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $42,873,000 + Health Canada $11,214,530 + CMHC $522,609 + Canada Post $586,324 + Province of Ontario $3,372,706 + OFLP $876,620 + SLAAMBM $162,452 = $69,608,241 net of deferred adjustments applied proportionally; OSR is other revenue line of $10,515,284 net of deferred. Note: deferred revenue movement makes segment and line-item government transfer totals complex. No schedule of remuneration provided.
